creator: lofi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Looks like a libtool problem, possibly the installed port/package is
outdated or defective. Try using binary packages or update the
ports-collection and your installed ports as decribed in
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/ports-using.html.
The KLocale warnings are harmless and unrelated.
